positive: A stylized, high-contrast vector illustration of an astronaut exploring a psychedelic, nebula-filled landscape. The astronaut is centered and depicted in a clean, solid silhouette with glowing neon blue and purple accents (like footprints or gear glow). Surrounding elements include geometric celestial bodies, stylized constellations, and whimsical, bioluminescent alien flora. The overall mood is dreamy, cosmic, and adventurous. Flat design meets retro-futurism. Perfect for screen printing on a dark t-shirt. Highly detailed line work, sharp focus, vibrant gradients, clean edges, minimalist composition, symmetry, solid background color suggested (deep space black).
